title: fraxinus oxyphylla var. parvifolia
intro: Fraxinus oxyphylla var. parvifolia, also known as the Chinese ash or small-leaved ash, is a plant species within the Fraxinus genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus oxyphylla var. parvifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
